title: Zero queued charges returns 404
description: Recharge API returns no charges in 28-day window; STATE never updated; downstream uses stale/empty demand

title: Shopify sync races Recharge background sync
description: shopify_sync reads stale STATE before recharge bg thread finishes; merge produces wrong counts

title: Saturday boundary window misclassifies charges
description: Running sync ON Saturday pushes today's charges to next Saturday window due to days_to_sat=7 logic

title: Bare CEX-EC with MONTHLY curation drops demand
description: AHB-LGE resolves to MONTHLY; bare CEX-EC suffix=None; extra cheese demand silently dropped

title: Recharge 429 exhausts 3 retries silently
description: Background sync catches all exceptions with bare except:pass; no logging no retry no error state

title: Cold start restores stale data before fresh sync fails
description: setdefault populates STATE with old settings; if fresh sync fails stale data used without warning

title: Renamed duplicate depletion XLSX causes double depletion
description: Filename dedup fails when operator renames copy; same shipment depleted twice

title: Unfulfilled orders without _SHIP_ tag excluded
description: Gap between order creation and tag assignment; demand invisible to both sources

title: Crash between STATE write and settings save causes re-depletion
description: Depletion applied to STATE but not persisted; restart reprocesses same file

title: MONG projection zero on 3-day acquisition gap
description: Site outage or promo gap drops daily_rate to 0; projection misses recovery surge

title: 2000+ charges cause 30-60s sync; operator acts on stale data
description: Long sync window allows cut order export with partial/stale STATE

title: Rapid sync clicks cause concurrent foreground syncs
description: No mutex; two syncs write STATE simultaneously; last writer wins with mixed data

title: CEX-EC split percentages rounding truncation loses demand
description: int() truncation on fractional splits; qty=1 with 0.6/0.3 split yields 0+0=0 demand

title: Shopify API version 2024-01 deprecation
description: Silent behavioral change when API version sunsets; fulfillment_status filter semantics may shift

title: Shopify prcjam double-counted after restart
description: STATE lost on restart; subtraction of old_sh_prcjam is empty; Shopify counts added on top of persisted totals

title: Recharge token expires mid-pagination
description: 401 on page 4+; 750 partial charges discarded entirely; falls back to stale cache

title: save_settings race between recharge and shopify sync
description: Recharge second save (line 6300) uses stale s object; overwrites Shopify demand data in settings

title: Unknown box SKU returns None curation
description: New AHB-XLGE not in resolver; PR-CJAM and CEX-EC demand silently dropped for new product

title: Journal with no snapshots yields negative inventory
description: compute_running_inventory starts from empty; depletions go negative; runway shows false all-clear

title: No acquisition/churn signal in demand pipeline
description: first_order_demand and recurring_demand computed but never used in forecasting; blind to growth/decline

title: 8-week rolling average masks seasonal spikes
description: Holiday surge inflates average 76%; cut order over-orders after promo ends; cheese expires

title: Partial JSON on disk full corrupts settings
description: Truncated write loses all demand data, depletion history, API tokens

title: Growing unfulfilled orders slow Shopify sync linearly
description: No server-side tag filter; fetches all unfulfilled then filters client-side; O(n) API calls

title: MONG projection drops to 0 near Monday midnight
description: hours_remaining approaches 0; projected_additional=0; under-projects for remaining demand window

title: auto_deplete and compute_running_inventory use different inventory sources
description: auto_deplete modifies STATE dict; journal doesn't get entry; calculated_inventory diverges from runtime inventory
